jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Miniklub - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
